message:
feat(command): implement GEOADD, GEOPOS, GEODIST, and GEOHASH commands

Full geospatial command set using WGS84 geohash encoding on top of
sorted sets. Includes: interleave/deinterleave bit manipulation for
52-bit geohash, Haversine distance calculation, base32 geohash string
encoding, and NX/XX/CH option support for GEOADD. Comprehensive tests
cover coordinate round-trips, distance units (M/KM/FT/MI), missing
member handling, and option conflict detection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
